label: Warm Local
description: Service-first variant for local businesses, salons, clinics, cafés, and hospitality.
signatureMotif: warm tints, rounded surfaces, and softly layered cards
promptHints: Prioritize opening hours, location trust, and a strong local CTA such as booking or visit planning.
Keep the emotional tone warm, welcoming, and clearly business-specific rather than startup-generic.

themeTokens.bodyBackgroundImage: radial-gradient(circle at top left, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-primary) 10%, white) 0%, transparent 26%), linear-gradient(to bottom, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 18%, white) 0%, transparent 24%)
